recommendations.title: Sexual Chronicles of a French Family
recommendations.overview: Three generations of a French family open up about their sexual experiences and desires after young Romain is caught masturbating in his biology class.

recommendations.title: The Horseman on the Roof
recommendations.overview: In a time of war and disease, a young officer gallantly tries to help a young woman find her husband.

recommendations.title: Baby Face
recommendations.overview: A young woman uses her body and her sexuality to help her climb the social ladder, but soon begins to wonder if her new status will ever bring her happiness.

recommendations.title: Skirt Day
recommendations.overview: A teacher, driven to exasperation from insults and insubordination, takes her class hostage.

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh - L’autre c’est moi
recommendations.overview: L'Autre c'est moi est le troisième spectacle de l'humoriste Gad Elmaleh, en 2005.

recommendations.title: Big Nothing
recommendations.overview: A frustrated, unemployed teacher joins forces with a scammer and his girlfriend in a blackmailing scheme.

recommendations.title: Breathless
recommendations.overview: A small-time thief steals a car and impulsively murders a motorcycle policeman. Wanted by the authorities, he attempts to persuade a girl to run away to Italy with him.

recommendations.title: Intuition
recommendations.overview: Police officer Pipa works on her first big case while simultaneously investigating her boss, who is suspected of murder. The prequel to "Perdida".

recommendations.title: Safety Last!
recommendations.overview: When a store clerk organizes a contest to climb the outside of a tall building, circumstances force him to make the perilous climb himself.

recommendations.title: The Lover
recommendations.overview: A poor French teenage girl engages in an illicit affair with a wealthy Chinese heir in 1920s Saigon. For the first time in her young life she has control, and she wields it deftly over her besotted lover throughout a series of clandestine meetings an
